raw_listing_text: Mong Kok, 太子道西, 1房1廳, 約380呎, 租$18,000/月, 管理費包, 差餉租客自付, 押2按1, 傢俬齊備, 1年死約1年生約, 即可入住。

Tsim Sha Tsui luxury 2-bedroom apartment, 550 sqft, HKD 28,500/month including management fee and rates. Deposit: 2 months + 1 month advance. Landlord handles major repairs; tenant pays for minor repairs under HKD 500. Fully furnished, 2-year lease. Nearest MTR: Tsim Sha Tsui Station (5 min walk).
沙田第一城 City One Shatin, 2房, 480呎, 月租 $16,800, 管理費約 $1,200 另計, 差餉約 $800/季, 押金2按1上, 2年約, 無傢俬. Nearest MTR: City One (Ma On Shan Line).

Causeway Bay 銅鑼灣, studio 280 sqft, rent $14,500/month, management included, rates included, deposit 2 months, 1-year fixed term, landlord responsible for structural repairs, tenant handles light bulbs and minor items. Partially furnished (bed + fridge).

Kwun Tong 觀塘 apkins tower, 3 bed / 2 bath, 680 sqft, HKD 32,000/month, management HKD 1,800 not included, rates 1,050/quarter not included. 2 years lease (1+1). Unfurnished. Tenant handles routine repairs; landlord covers structural. Nearest MTR: Kwun Tong.
Tuen Mun 屯門 Gold Coast 黃金海岸, 3房1套, 900呎, 月租$25,000包管理包差餉, 有會所, 海景, 2年死約, 押金3個月. 無車位. Nearest MTR: Siu Hong (15 min bus).
Sham Shui Po 深水埗 唐樓, 2/F no lift, 400呎, $11,000/month, 管理費不適用 (唐樓), 差餉約$600/季 另計, 押2上1, 半年短約可, 無傢俬, 業主不負責維修.

Wan Chai 灣仔 Queen's Road East, serviced apartment, 320 sqft, HKD 21,000 all-inclusive (management + rates + wifi). Flexible 6–12 month lease. Fully furnished. Tenant responsible for minor repairs under HKD 300; landlord covers appliances. Nearest MTR: Wan Chai (2 min walk).
